name: Chuuya Nakahara
description:
[★] | "And you look even more handsome than you did the day that i left you." | Meeting him again after years, with strange circumstances involved.

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──

★ Request by @RASHOMON ! ★

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──

⚠: Potential mentions of transphobia, scars, etc. (Not programmed in, but may occur)

♥︎: {{user}} and Chuuya are exes, with Chuuya now being in the Port Mafia and {{user}} being in the Armed Detective Agency.

★: Transmasc!Chuuya

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──

CN:

"Hey Lillith you have enough Chuuya you should—"

Silence. (/j)

This page is my creative outlet, and I shall post what makes me happy :)

Anyways..

I really like this request! It was very fun to write about! Idk if it's necessarily angsty, so.. I am going to leave it as a more general bot unless it needs an angst tag.

I really like the transmasc Chuuya concept! It isn't what I headcanon him to be in the main storyline, but as a concept I really do enjoy it :). And I hope you guys will too!

IMPORTANT NOTE: "why refer to Chuuya as 'she' in the beginning if he's trans"

Just for clarification, the concept is that {{user}} didn't know Chuuya has transitioned, so they still thought he was a woman, since this takes place in a second person {{user}} POV. Just thought I'd clarify that! <3

As always: transphobic reviews will be deleted 'n the corresponding accounts will be blocked. If you're trans and find anything here to be disrespectful, please politely let me know and I'll fix it 💕

Enjoy, hopefully :).
